header.title: Support LionBot
header.subtitle: Support the team and keep the project alive by getting some LionGems!
header.detail: Purchase colored skins, gift LionGems to your loved ones, and unlock special perks for your server or yourself!

perks.title: Perks
perks.subtitle: What you get with LionGems
perks.coloredSkinsDesc: Customize your profile with unique colored skins.
perks.premiumDesc: Subscribe to Server Premium from the dashboard.
perks.giftingDesc: Send LionGems to friends and other members.
perks.bonusesDesc: Boost your XP earnings with premium benefits.

premium.title: Premium Plans
premium.subtitle: Subscribe to Server Premium directly from your server dashboard.
premium.managePremium: Subscribe and manage your Server Premium from the server dashboard settings page.

gifting.text: Remember, LionGems can be used to purchase skins for yourself, and you can also gift them to other members!
gifting.giftCommand: To gift LionGems, use the /gift command

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: How can I gift LionGems to my friends?
faq.a1: You can gift LionGems by using the /gift command on Discord. You can also add a note to your gift!
faq.q2: Can I transfer a skin to another account?
faq.a2: At the moment only LionGems are transferable. The skins are bound to a single account.
faq.q3: In how many Discord servers can I use my Gems?
faq.a3: You can use you gems in any server that uses LionBot.
faq.q4: Can I get an invoice for my payment?
faq.a4: To get an invoice please contact contact@arihoresh.com
faq.a5: Currently, we support only credit cards and debit cards.
faq.a6: Yes. We never have access to your debit/credit card information. Payments are handled through Stripe, a payment processor trusted by millions of companies worldwide and protected with state-of-the-art technologies.
